name: com.saimayank.scene-doctor
description: One-click health check for Unity scenes. Scans the open scene(s) for common beginner mistakes — missing scripts, broken / unassigned references, missing EventSystem, duplicate AudioListeners, MainCamera tag issues, 2D/3D physics mismatches, UI outside a Canvas, and expensive calls (GetComponent / Find / Camera.main) inside Update. Editor-only, no runtime footprint.
